label: Crabbox: Status of box…
args:
crabbox list; printf '
Lease id or slug: '; read -r id; test -n "$id" && exec crabbox status --id "$id" --wait

label: Crabbox: Run command on box…
args:
crabbox list; printf '
Lease id or slug: '; read -r id; test -n "$id" || exit 2; printf 'Remote command: '; read -r command; test -n "$command" && exec crabbox run --id "$id" --shell -- "$command"

label: Crabbox: SSH into box…
args:
crabbox list; printf '
Lease id or slug: '; read -r id; test -n "$id" && exec crabbox connect "$id"

label: Crabbox: Inspect box…
args:
crabbox list; printf '
Lease id or slug: '; read -r id; test -n "$id" && exec crabbox inspect --id "$id"

label: Crabbox: Stop box…
args:
crabbox list; printf '
Lease id or slug to stop: '; read -r id; test -n "$id" && exec crabbox stop "$id"
